The '''''Valiant''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] prior to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]''
